Package javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection

NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network.

See:
          Description

Interface Summary
NetworkConnection A NetworkConnection is a JoinableContainer that drives network media ports.
SdpPortManager Handle a set of media ports, defined by a pair of Session Descriptions.
SdpPortManagerEvent An event from a SdpPortManager.
 

Class Summary
CodecPolicy Allow the application to influence on the codecs and media-types used in the network transport.
 

Exception Summary
SdpException Exception thrown in case of problem with the SDP content, like a syntax error or parsing issue.
SdpPortManagerException General purpose exception for the SdpPortManager.
 

Package javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection Description

NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network.

Package Specification

The NetworkConnection also includes the set of resources associated to the network port, like AutomaticGainControl or EchoCancellation.
It accepts SDP-based controls. The signaling delegates media negociations part of a call to the Network connection.
